candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Noncurrent assets balancing line, not current assets.
Balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents proxy; best match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at start of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet year-end cash target.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate differences in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Not a cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Adjustment for items not included in cash flow
candidates.why: Adjustment line, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow used in operating activities
candidates.why: Cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.
Cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.
Cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.
Net change, not cash balance.
Balancing line, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Net Change in Cash including Foreign Exchange Effects
candidates.why: Change in cash, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet cash line rather than cash-flow statement beginning/end cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Direct match to short-term debt/current interest-bearing liabilities; excludes leases.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Direct match to current maturities of long-term debt excluding leases; suitable STD component.
Current liability but explicitly lease-related, which should be excluded from STD baseline.
Operating payable, not debt.
Too broad; not specifically short-term debt.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: R:c. Selected the non-lease financing current debt lines. They appear complementary across years; avoided current lease liabilities.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Best semantic match to total property, plant and equipment / net tangible fixed assets.
Specific PPE component; useful fallback if total tangible assets is unavailable in some years.
Gross equipment only, narrower than total PPE and less preferred than total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Tangible assets Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset line, not PPE itself.
Not PPE.

variables.notes: R:nc. Preferred 'Tangible assets' as the closest total/net PPE label, but its preview values are blank; 'Equipment' is included as fallback because it is the only clearly populated PPE-related asset line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow used in operating activities
candidates.why: Best direct operating cash flow subtotal / net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow used in operating activities

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the final net operating cash flow line, which better matches OANCF than the 'before Changes in Working Capital' subtotal.
